siteSettings.name: RIF
siteSettings.tagline: Building scalable ventures from research, regional insight, and founder grit.
siteSettings.location: MJP Rohilkhand University, Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh
siteSettings.footerNote: NSRCEL-inspired digital experience adapted for RIF with a modern content-managed architecture.

homepage.announcement: Applications are live for the 2026 Venture Studio and community membership intake.

hero.title: A startup launchpad for university-born ideas and market-ready ventures.
hero.description: RIF connects founders, mentors, researchers, and ecosystem partners through incubation, venture support, memberships, and startup services. The experience is modeled on the ambition and clarity of leading incubator websites while staying editable through a simple CMS.
hero.spotlightTitle: What founders get inside the platform
spotlightItems: Mentor office hours and strategic reviews

cta.title: Designed for institutional credibility and founder momentum.
cta.description: Every major section is editable from the admin dashboard so the website can handle updates, applications, media, documents, and announcements without code changes.

overview.title: About RIF
overview.body: Rohilkhand Incubation Foundation is a university-linked innovation platform that supports venture creation, startup services, ecosystem partnerships, and entrepreneurial capability building. This website architecture is designed so institutional teams can update content quickly while maintaining a polished public presence.
overview.mission: To help ambitious founders turn ideas into responsible, scalable ventures through structured support and strong ecosystem access.
overview.vision: To become a high-trust regional hub for innovation, venture building, and research commercialization.

pillars.title: Incubation
pillars.description: Stage-specific venture support covering discovery, validation, and growth.

pillars.title: Community
pillars.description: Membership programs that keep founders, experts, and institutional partners engaged.

pillars.title: Capability
pillars.description: Mentor access, workshops, reviews, and operational guidance.

pillars.title: Visibility
pillars.description: News, events, founder stories, and document publishing for institutional outreach.

about.galleryIntro: A flexible image and document module supports institution updates, visits, demos, and events.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: How we collect, use, and safeguard the information shared through the RIF website and related forms.
privacyPolicy.summary: We respect personal information and use it only for legitimate platform, program, and communication purposes.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
paragraphs: {organisationName} may collect personal details that you voluntarily provide through enquiry forms, application forms, membership forms, newsletter requests, event registrations, and other website interactions. This may include your name, email address, phone number, organisation details, startup information, and supporting documents.
We may also collect limited technical information such as browser type, device information, pages visited, and approximate usage analytics to help us maintain and improve the website experience.

sections.heading: How We Use Information
paragraphs: We use collected information to respond to enquiries, evaluate applications, process memberships, provide startup support services, share updates related to programs and events, and improve our institutional communication.

Your information may also be used for internal record keeping, security monitoring, reporting, and compliance with legal or administrative obligations connected to our incubation and outreach activities.

sections.heading: Sharing and Protection
paragraphs: {organisationName} does not sell personal information. Data may be shared only with authorised internal teams, mentors, reviewers, service partners, or legal authorities where reasonably required for program operations, verification, compliance, or service delivery.
We take reasonable administrative and technical steps to protect your information. However, no internet-based transmission or storage system can be guaranteed as completely secure.

sections.heading: Your Choices
paragraphs: You may request correction, update, or deletion of personal information submitted through this website, subject to any record-retention needs, legal obligations, or active program requirements.
For privacy-related requests, please contact us at {contactEmail}. We will review requests in a reasonable time and respond based on applicable operational and legal requirements.

termsConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsConditions.description: The general terms governing access to the website, use of forms, and participation-related requests.
termsConditions.summary: Using this website means agreeing to fair, lawful, and institutionally managed use of its content, forms, and services.

sections.heading: Use of the Website
paragraphs: By accessing or using this website, you agree to use it lawfully and in a manner that does not disrupt, damage, or impair the services, content, infrastructure, or experience of other users.

Content on this website is provided for general institutional, informational, and program-related purposes. {organisationName} may update, revise, suspend, or remove content, forms, services, or website features at any time without prior notice.

sections.heading: Applications, Memberships, and Services
paragraphs: Submission of any application, registration, membership, or service request through this website does not by itself guarantee acceptance, onboarding, approval, funding, incubation, certification, or any specific outcome.

{organisationName} reserves the right to review eligibility, request supporting information, reject incomplete submissions, and make final decisions on participation, services, and institutional engagement according to its internal criteria and policies.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property and Accuracy
paragraphs: Unless otherwise stated, website content including text, branding, layouts, graphics, and downloadable material belongs to or is used with permission by {organisationName}. Unauthorised copying, commercial reuse, or misrepresentation is prohibited.

While we aim to keep content accurate and current, we do not warrant that all information is always complete, error-free, or uninterrupted. Users should contact us directly for confirmation where a matter is important.

sections.heading: Limitation and Contact
paragraphs: {organisationName} will not be responsible for indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from use of this website, reliance on website content, temporary unavailability, or third-party links and services.
Questions about these terms may be shared with us at {contactEmail} or through our office at {location}.

refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.description: The standard policy governing payments, exceptions, and refund-related support requests.
refundPolicy.summary: Most payments are non-refundable once processed, with limited review for duplicate charges, technical errors, or operational cancellations.

sections.heading: General Refund Position
paragraphs: {organisationName} may collect payments for memberships, registrations, services, events, workshops, or other approved activities where applicable. Unless a specific written commitment states otherwise, payments once processed are generally treated as non-refundable.
This approach is necessary because administrative review, scheduling, documentation handling, and service allocation may begin soon after successful payment or registration.

sections.heading: Cases Where Review May Be Considered
paragraphs: Refund requests may be reviewed in limited situations such as duplicate transactions, proven technical payment errors, or payments received for a service that {organisationName} is unable to provide due to its own operational cancellation.
Any approved refund will be processed only after verification of payment records, request details, and the applicable service terms for the relevant program, event, or membership.

sections.heading: Non-Refundable Situations
paragraphs: Refunds are ordinarily not available where a user changes their mind after applying or registering, fails to attend a session or event, provides incomplete or incorrect information, or is found ineligible under program or membership criteria.
Processing charges, gateway charges, taxes, and other third-party deductions may also be excluded from any refund amount where such charges are non-recoverable.

sections.heading: How to Request Support
paragraphs: For payment-related queries, please contact {organisationName} at {contactEmail} with your name, transaction reference, payment date, amount, and the reason for the request.
We will review the request in good faith and communicate the status after verification. Where a refund is approved, timelines will depend on banking and payment partner processing cycles.

rifServices.supportCardDescription: Please connect with our team for guidance, support, and collaboration enquiries.
rifServices.eligibilityIntro: Entrepreneurs and startups interested in applying for incubation at RIF should review the following criteria.
eligibilityPoints: Startup or entrepreneur should be an innovative product/process/service candidate.
Entity can be a private limited company, LLP, registered partnership firm, or proprietorship.
The startup should be less than 10 years old from date of incorporation.
Annual turnover in any preceding financial year must not exceed INR 25 crore.
The venture should have potential for scaling and employment generation.

screeningSteps.title: Step 1
screeningSteps.description: Submission of application in electronic format by entrepreneurs or startups.

screeningSteps.title: Step 2
screeningSteps.description: Review by the incubation evaluation committee and initial screening.

screeningSteps.title: Step 3
screeningSteps.description: Presentation by shortlisted applicants before the committee.

screeningSteps.title: Step 4
screeningSteps.description: Final recommendation and incubation agreement process for selected startups.
